title: CIL, Energy, Minerals, and Polity Mock Test 3

sections.name: Coal India Limited (CIL) and its Subsidiaries

questions.q: Coal India Limited (CIL) is under the administrative control of which ministry?
In which year was Coal India Limited incorporated and where is its headquarters located?
Which subsidiary of Coal India Limited is currently the largest coal producer?
What is the current Maharatna status of Coal India Limited and when was it granted?
What is the classification status of Coal India Limited in terms of CPSE categorization?
Which is the largest coal-producing subsidiary of Coal India Limited?
Which organization is responsible for coal exploration in India?
What is the concept of fly ash utilization and why is it crucial for CIL's sustainable goals?
options: Using ash to clean mining machinery
Utilization of by-products of burning pulverized coal in cement, bricks, and roads to reduce pollution
Converting ash into liquid petroleum gas
Dumping ash deep inside active underground mines

questions.q: What does the term 'First Mile Connectivity' mean in CIL's green initiatives?
options: Mechanized coal transportation from pit head to dispatch point via conveyors or silos to reduce road dust
Building the first highway linking a village to a mine
Providing high-speed internet up to one mile around the coalfield
Transporting coal using fully electric hybrid heavy trucks

questions.q: What is the purpose of mine void reclamation?
options: Leaving open mines as water reservoirs without backfilling
Filling open cast mine cavities with overburden and topsoil followed by afforestation
Searching for leftover coal pieces using advanced robots
Setting up underground heavy manufacturing industries

questions.q: What is Coal Bed Methane (CBM)?
options: A toxic liquid chemical layer found underneath the coal bed
A form of natural gas extracted from coal beds that serves as a clean energy source and reduces explosion risk
Artificial methane gas injected into mines to preserve coal quality
Solid crystal formation of carbon found in deep lignite mines

questions.q: What is the full form of CBM in the context of coal mining?
What is the target set by the Government of India for coal production by 2025-26?
What is the process of converting coal into liquid fuel called?
What is the status of Coal India Limited in terms of CPSE classification?
Which type of coal has the highest carbon content?
Which option correctly ranks the four main types of coal from highest to lowest carbon content?
Which Indian state has the largest reserve of coal?
What is the calorific value of coal measured in?
Which coalfield in India is the largest open cast coal mine?
What is cooking coal primarily used for?
What is Gondwana coal and why is it important for India?
options: It is young tertiary coal found exclusively in Jammu and Kashmir
It makes up over 98% of India's coal reserves and is completely free of marine impurities
It is a low-grade coal containing more than 80% moisture
It is synthetic coal produced in high-temperature laboratories

questions.q: Which mineral is known as 'Black Gold'?
Which Indian state has the largest lignite reserve?
What is the primary constituent metal of brass and bronze respectively?
options: Brass: Copper + Zinc, Bronze: Copper + Tin
Brass: Copper + Tin, Bronze: Copper + Zinc
Brass: Iron + Chromium, Bronze: Copper + Nickel
Brass: Aluminum + Copper, Bronze: Lead + Tin

questions.q: What is the difference between a mineral and an ore?
options: All minerals are ores, but all ores are not minerals
Minerals are organic while ores are always synthetic
An ore is a type of mineral from which metal can be extracted profitably
Ores do not have a definite chemical composition but minerals do

questions.q: Which international agreement guides global action on climate change and carbon emission reduction, directly impacting coal policies?
What is the full form of DGMS in the context of mining in India?
options: Department of Geological and Mining Sciences

questions.q: PM KUSUM scheme is related to which sector?
The National Mineral Policy 2019 replaced the earlier policy of which year?
The Mines and Mineral Development and Regulation Act was first enacted in which year?
Which element is added to iron to control its hardness and convert it into steel?
What is the rank of India in world coal production?
Which country is the largest producer of coal in the world?
